name: Plum Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 garlic cloves (peeled), 1 cut in half, 1 minced
1/2 teaspoon crushed hot red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the kidney beans overnight in plenty of water.
2. Drain and rinse the beans the next day.
3. Place the beans in a large pot, cover with fresh water, and bring to a boil.
4. Add halved garlic, 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, 1/4 teaspoon salt, bay leaf, and 1/4 cup vinegar.
5. Simmer until tender, about 1 hour.
6. Drain the beans.
7. While still warm, stir in minced garlic, remaining 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, 3/4 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons vinegar, plum jam, cilantro, and black pepper to taste.
8. Serve at room temperature.
